# terrible_community_general_pkgin (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `clean` (Boolean) Clean packages cache.
- `force` (Boolean) Force package reinstall.
- `full_upgrade` (Boolean) Upgrade all packages to their newer versions.
- `name` (String) Name of package to install/remove; Multiple names may be given, separated by commas.
- `state` (String) Intended state of the package.
- `update_cache` (Boolean) Update repository database. Can be run with other steps or on its own.
- `upgrade` (Boolean) Upgrade main packages to their newer versions.
